name: Talked to insurance adjuster after work sprain in Riverton, did I mess up?
description: Limit talks; get lawyer before more—protects claim.[1]

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after work sprain in Riverton, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Limit talks; get lawyer before more—protects claim.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly; statements can be used against you—don't give recorded info without lawyer.** Adjusters minimize claims.[1] Key factors: Stick to facts; no speculation. Request claim status in writing. Lawyer handles communications. Review what you said.
